svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ FEATURE MATCHING STRATEGIES │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
BRUTE FORCE MATCHING FLANN MATCHING ──────────────────── ────────────── Compare each descriptor Approximate nearest neighbor to all others using KD-trees or LSH
Image 1 Image 2 Image 1 Image 2 ●───────────────● ●─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─● ●───────────────● ●─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─● ●───────────────● ●─ ─ ─ ─ ─ ─●
Pros: Accurate Pros: Much faster Cons: O(n²) slow Cons: Approximate
RATIO TEST (Lowe's) ─────────────────── Match only if: distance(best) / distance(second_best) andlt; threshold
Good match: Bad match: d1 = 0.1 d1 = 0.4 d2 = 0.5 d2 = 0.5 ratio = 0.2 ✓ ratio = 0.8 ✗
